title: Event
description: Engine -> UIs (the doctor's phone app), published to neuraroute/event and streamed over the engine /ws. One schema, discriminated by 'type'. Most fields are optional so a UI can render whatever a given event carries. v2 additions: patient_id/vitals on request_start, result on task_done, severity/reason/vitals/source on sos.

from_device.description: on failover: the tier that dropped or errored

reason.description: human-readable explanation, shown in the app's activity feed

patient_id.description: which patient this reading/verdict/alert is about

vitals.description: the raw reading (on request_start and sos)

result.description: on task_done: the triage output {patient_id, severity, transcript}

source.description: on sos: what raised it, e.g. watchdog-arduino-01

score.description: ladder breakdown for the chosen tier (tier index, ladder order)

metrics.description: run metrics: latency, tier, failovers, failover_time_s, cloud_calls
